name: @xniffing/pi-gmail-assistant
description: Gmail extension for Pi with OAuth setup, inbox tools, attachment downloads, and safe send confirmation.
author: xniffing

scripts.build: node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module --eval "await import('./index.ts'); await import('./oauth.ts'); await import('./token-store.ts'); await import('./gmail-client.ts'); await import('./message-parser.ts'); await import('./attachment-client.ts'); await import('./send-mail.ts'); await import('./types.ts'); console.log('gmail-extension-build-ok');"
